root.rep_text: -> รายงานเคลื่อนไหวหุ้น
root.sql:
select SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_name ,sum(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.return_interest) as return_interest
from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ,sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ,SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP where 1=1 and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.membership_no and SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no = SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code like 'ML%' -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = 2025 -- and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = 8 /*WHERE*/ group by SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no ,SC_MEM_M_UCF_MEMBER_GROUP.member_group_name order by SC_MEM_M_MEMBERSHIP_REGISTERED.member_group_no asc
